title: Rhythm: high-frequency words paragraph
description: Rhythm exercise — high-frequency words flowing as natural prose
text: the way we work today is different from the way we worked ten years ago, and the way we will work next year is also going to change with the times.

tips.text: Read the sentence first, then type it as one continuous flow
Enable metronome at 45 BPM — match your rhythm to it

tips.target: the way we work today is different from the way we worked ten years ago,

tips.text: Don't pause at commas — they're rhythm beats, not stops

tips.target: and the way we will work next year is also going to change with the times.

character_tips.anna: Real writing flows. Match the tempo of speech, not single keystrokes.
character_tips.maxim: Prose has its own rhythm — find it and ride it.
character_tips.knopych: FLOW STATE! 🌊 Don't break the wave!
character_tips.klavochka: Like reading aloud, my dear — smooth and steady 📖
